en.name: Level 95 — Toward Agape
en.shortDescription: An ever-constructing level whose corridors converge on a central point where a machine god assembles something at its core.
en.atmosphere: Mechanical yet mystical: industrial corridors oriented inward toward an omniscient machine consciousness issuing precise instructions.
en.tips: The level keeps rebuilding itself. Understanding the machine god's odd theology may be the key to navigating it safely.
